actionSheet.title: Choose Photo Source
actionSheet.message: Select where you would like to upload a photo from

update.available: A new update is available. Click to relaunch.

slides.title: Modern Native Architecture
slides.description: Built using Expo SDK 54, React Native, and Expo Router for a fast cross-platform app foundation.

slides.title: Robust State & Networking
slides.description: Zustand handles client state, while TanStack Query organizes caching, pagination, and API fetching.

slides.title: Premium Design System
slides.description: Over 35 atomic UI components designed with system-aware Light & Dark themes, organic shadows, and Outfit typography.

details.title: Details View

details.author: Author: {{author}}
details.sampleParagraph: This screen demonstrates TanStack Query dynamic navigation parameter passing. The item data is fetched, rendered beautifully using our styling grid tokens, and inherits organic layout shadows.
